data.description: The Prime Minister of Sweden calls to suspend the free trade agreement between the European Union and Israel - reports

data.title: Comcast reports 3% growth in Adjusted EPS and $4.5B free cash flow in Q2 2025, returns $2.9B to shareholders.
data.description: In Philadelphia, Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ: CMCSA) announced their financial results for the quarter ending on June 30, 2025. Chairman and CEO Brian L. Roberts stated that they achieved a 3% growth in Adjusted EPS and produced $4.5 billion in free cash flow. The company also invested in their growth ventures and gave back $2.9 billion to shareholders during this period. Overall, Comcast expressed contentment with their initial advancements.

data.title: IonQ partners with Oak Ridge National Laboratory to advance energy sector modernization with hybrid quantum-classical approach surpassing novel quantum algorithms.
data.description: In College Park, Maryland, a new hybrid approach that combines quantum and classical methods has proven to be more effective than recently developed quantum algorithms in advancing the modernization of the energy sector. This innovative approach shows promising results in enhancing energy-related processes.

TRUMP SAYS POWELL IS COSTING THE US 'TRILLIONS OF DOLLARS'

data.title: Visa cardholders can apply early for FIFA World Cup 26™ tickets. Visa offers exclusive access to Debit, Credit, and prepaid cardholders globally.
data.description: In Washington, Visa has been declared as the Official Payment Technology Partner for FIFA World Cup 26™. Visa, a major player in digital payments, is granting Visa cardholders worldwide with Visa Debit, Credit, or reloadable Visa prepaid cards the opportunity for early ticket access to the highly anticipated sports event. The inaugural Visa Presale Draw has been revealed at the Visa Payments Vault in Washington, D.C., providing exclusive benefits to its cardholders. This partnership sets the stage for fans to secure tickets to the FIFA World Cup 26™ through Visa's platforms.

data.title: Comcast declares quarterly dividend of $0.33 per share, payable on October 22, 2025, to shareholders as of October 1.
data.description: In Philadelphia, Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ: CMCSA) revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.33 per share on its common stock. The dividend will be paid on October 22, 2025, to shareholders of record as of October 1, 2025. To stay updated on Comcast's financial news via email, visit www.cmcsa.com and sign up for E-mail Alerts. Comcast Corporation, listed as Nasdaq: CMCSA, is a prominent player in the industry.

data.title: Buckeye Transplant Solutions and Afflo merge to expand transplant services across North America, completed on July 31, 2025.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, in Buffalo, NY, Buckeye Transplant Solutions and Afflo finalized their merger, combining their expertise as the top providers of specialized services and technology solutions for transplant centers. The merger brings together two industry leaders to enhance services for transplant centers across the nation. This collaboration is set to drive innovation and improve patient care in the field of organ transplants.

data.title: Figma, a software maker, backed by VCs, will go public Thursday. Anticipated on Wall Street, could trigger IPO rush.
data.description: Figma, a software company that was once considered for acquisition by Adobe, is set to go public on Thursday. The Figma IPO has generated a lot of excitement among investors, with many on Wall Street eagerly awaiting its debut. This venture capital-backed IPO is expected to be significant, leading to speculation about whether it will encourage more companies to pursue initial public offerings.

data.title: SNDL reports positive operating income in Q2 2025. Net revenue reaches $244.8 million, +7.3% growth. Gross profit hits $67.6 million, up +16.2%. Rest of the details available on Benzinga.com.
data.description: SNDL Inc. reported positive operating income for the first time in its history, with net revenue of $244.8 million in the second quarter of 2025, up 7.3% from the previous year. Gross profit increased by 16.2% to $67.6 million, with a gross margin of 27.6%, showing a 2.1% improvement. The company's operating income was $5.0 million, including a restructuring charge. Cash flow was negative at $(12.6) million, primarily due to working capital investments. The company's Liquor Retail segment saw an increase in net revenue by 1%, with same-store sales rising by 2.7%. SNDL's Cannabis Retail segment experienced a net revenue growth of 11%. The company's strategic initiatives included acquisitions, investments in CAPEX, and a loyalty program launch. SNDL aims to become a global cannabis leader with a solid financial position, having no debt and $208.2 million in cash as of June 30, 2025. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Aeva and Bendix collaborate on L2+ safety solutions for commercial vehicles in North America, targeting Class 8 trucks.
data.description: Aeva, a prominent company in next-gen sensing and perception systems, has revealed a partnership with Bendix Commercial Vehicle Systems (Bendix), a top provider of advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS) for commercial vehicles in North America. This collaboration is aimed at developing innovative active safety and collision mitigation solutions for Class 8 trucks and beyond. The North American market for commercial vehicle ADAS is vast and presents significant potential for growth.

data.title: FiscalNote sees global commercial growth with accelerating PolicyNote adoption.
data.description: FiscalNote is experiencing significant worldwide commercial expansion as the adoption of PolicyNote is rapidly increasing.

data.title: Investment firm Brighton Park Capital opens London office with new Partner Tom Hussey leading European expansion. First office outside U.S. Offices in NY, CT, and SF. Active investor in EMEA.
data.description: Brighton Park Capital, an investment firm specializing in software and healthcare growth-stage companies, has unveiled a new office in London. The firm, headquartered in New York with additional locations in Connecticut and San Francisco, has expanded internationally with this latest office. Tom Hussey has been appointed as Partner to oversee the European team's operations. Brighton Park has been actively investing in the EMEA region and the new London office signifies its commitment to growing its presence globally.

data.title: OXIO appoints Steve Parrott as SVP of Product Management, bringing 20 years of experience to lead product roadmap.
data.description: In New York, OXIO, a prominent Telecom-as-a-Service (TaaS) platform, has appointed Steve Parrott as the senior vice president of product management. With close to two decades of experience in the telecom and technology sectors, Parrott will oversee OXIO’s product roadmap and delivery. This strategic move aims to bolster the company's objective of creating the world's telecom network of the future. Parrott's leadership will be instrumental in driving innovation and growth as OXIO continues its journey as a trailblazer in the telecom industry.

data.title: BlackSky (NYSE: BKSY) to join investor conferences in August. Includes Oppenheimer event on Aug 11 & Canaccord Genuity on Aug 12. Henry Dubois to present.
data.description: BlackSky Technology Inc. (NYSE: BKSY) is scheduled to take part in upcoming investor events in August. This includes the Oppenheimer 28th Annual Technology, Internet & Communications Conference on August 11, 2025, where Henry Dubois, the chief financial officer of BlackSky, will present at 10:45 a.m. ET. The event will be held virtually. Additionally, the company will be presenting at the Canaccord Genuity 45th Annual Growth Conference on August 12, 2025, with Henry Dubois again presenting at 10:30 a.m. ET.

data.title: Outpost24 launches free Credential Checker tool to detect exposed credentials on dark web, aiding in preventing data breaches.
data.description: In Philadelphia today, Outpost24, a prominent provider of cyber risk management and threat intelligence solutions, introduced the Outpost24 Credential Checker. This new tool, offered for free, offers organizations a glimpse into exposed credentials on the dark web. Having timely insight into credential exposure can be crucial in preventing a potential data breach, regardless of an organization's size. The Outpost24 Credential Checker addresses this critical concern by allowing organizations to quickly check for any compromised credentials.

data.title: Intel 471 launches Verity471 cyber intelligence platform, offering new threat exposure modules. Promotes collaboration among security teams.
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, today, Intel 471 unveiled Verity471, the latest cyber threat intelligence (CTI) platform. As the top global provider of cyber intelligence-driven solutions, Intel 471's Verity471 integrates its full range of solutions into one platform to enhance intelligence capabilities, streamline workflows, and encourage increased collaboration among security teams. This platform goes beyond providing CTI by offering actionable insights, combining various solutions to enhance cyber threat defense.

data.title: Mitsubishi Motors unveils 2025 Outlander Trail Edition with exclusive off-highway styling and equipment package.
data.description: The Outlander 2025 Trail Edition is the first specialized off-highway styling and equipment package offered by the brand. This edition includes unique features such as exclusive 18-inch wheels, a black graphic package, black trim details, and dedicated all-weather floor mats. In addition to these, dealers can install accessories like the Cooper Discoverer tires. This Trail Edition marks a significant step in catering to off-road enthusiasts, providing a distinct option in the Outlander lineup for those looking to enhance their outdoor adventure experience.

data.title: SiriusXM Q2 2025 results announced, detailed on company website. Check NASDAQ: SIRI for more info.
data.description: Today, July 31, 2025, SiriusXM (NASDAQ: SIRI) released its financial and operational outcomes for the second quarter of 2025. The comprehensive report can be accessed on the Investor Relations webpage of the organization's site at https://investor.siriusxm.com.
